title: P0: cbor_put_map_header truncates counts >255 without setting overflow
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:65 - cbor_put_map_header takes uint8_t so count>255 wraps; violates 'ensure no truncation' from prior review. Even with map_count check, better to take uint16_t param and explicitly set overflow if >0xff before writing. codereview
close_reason: cbor_put_*_header now uses explicit >0xff overflow set with uint16_t param; callers updated to avoid (uint8_t) truncation before check. 3 codereview passes completed (findings filed as separate beads per workflow). No overflow/truncation for counts>255. Verified in coap_status.c. Followed all mandatory steps.
